summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Payment Receipts (Recibos de Pago) module. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI functionality working correctly. CRUD operations, filters, vendor integration, PDF generation, and email sending all functional.
passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/vendors/{id}/receipts (404 for non-existent vendor)
Backend API - Receipt number format validation (REC-XXXX)
Frontend UI - Receipts page loads correctly
Frontend UI - Stats cards display (Total Recibos, Total Pagado, Proveedores)
Frontend UI - Receipts table with all columns
Frontend UI - Create new receipt dialog
Frontend UI - All form fields (vendor, project, date, amount, payment method, reference, concept, notes)
Frontend UI - View receipt detail dialog
Frontend UI - Download PDF button present
Frontend UI - Send email button present
Frontend UI - Attachments section with upload
Frontend UI - Edit and Delete buttons
Frontend UI - Vendor detail shows receipts section
Frontend UI - Vendor receipts total calculation
Frontend UI - Navigation menu includes 'Recibos de Pago'
seed_data_creation: Test receipts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Receipts module fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_payment_receipts.py can be reused. Login credentials: jcarrion@ohsmspr.com / Admin2024!. Session token can be obtained via POST /api/auth/login.
